meaning: 扬斯敦[美国俄亥俄州东北部城市]
examples: A study conducted in Youngstown, Ohio, for example, discovered that greener areas of the city experienced less crime.
Youngstown was designed for lots of people but is occupied by just a few.
A community of northeast Ohio, a suburb of Youngstown. Population, 32,371.
With more than 43 percent of the land vacant, Youngstown is slowly being erased.
Ms. LUCILLE BURTON (Delegate): My name is Lucille Burton and I am from Youngstown, Ohio.
